languages.text: Every time a creature dies of falls unconscious, Trazyn gains THP equal to {uip|thp|3667d95821c34b03af8e92b93facf9fa}% of his max HP. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

traits.locale_text: Whenever a creature dies or falls unconscious, Trazyn gains <u>(5% of Tranzyn's maximum wounds)</u> temporary wounds. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

languages.text: Когда какое-либо существо в бою погибает или теряет сознание, Тразин получает {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}временное здоровье{/g}, равное {uip|thp|3667d95821c34b03af8e92b93facf9fa}% от своего {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}максимального здоровья{/g}. Суммируется до 10 раз.

Когда какое-либо существо в бою погибает или теряет сознание, Тразин получает {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}временное здоровье{/g}, равное {uip|thp|3667d95821c34b03af8e92b93facf9fa}% от своего {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}максимального здоровья{/g}. Суммируется до 10 раз.

languages.text: Lorsqu'une créature meurt ou perd connaissance, Trazyn gagne des {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}blessures temporaires{/g} égales à +{uip|thp|3667d95821c34b03af8e92b93facf9fa} de ses {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}blessures maximum{/g}. Cet effet est cumulable jusqu'à 10 fois.
languages.original_text: Whenever a creature dies or falls unconscious, Trazyn gains {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} equal to {uip|thp|3667d95821c34b03af8e92b93facf9fa}% of his {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

traits.locale_text: Lorsqu'une créature meurt ou perd connaissance, Trazyn gagne des {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}blessures temporaires{/g} égales à +{uip|thp|3667d95821c34b03af8e92b93facf9fa} de ses {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}blessures maximum{/g}. Cet effet est cumulable jusqu'à 10 fois.

languages.text: Bir yaratık öldüğünde veya baygın düştüğünde Trazyn, %{uip|thp|3667d95821c34b03af8e92b93facf9fa} {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maksimum sağlık{/g} puanı kadar {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}geçici sağlık{/g} puanı kazanır. Bu etki, en fazla 10 kez üst üste birikebilir.
languages.original_text: Whenever a creature dies or falls unconscious, Trazyn gains {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} equal to {uip|thp|3667d95821c34b03af8e92b93facf9fa}% of his {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

traits.locale_text: Bir yaratık öldüğünde veya baygın düştüğünde Trazyn, %{uip|thp|3667d95821c34b03af8e92b93facf9fa} {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maksimum sağlık{/g} puanı kadar {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}geçici sağlık{/g} puanı kazanır. Bu etki, en fazla 10 kez üst üste birikebilir.

languages.text: 有生物死亡或昏迷时，特拉金获得等同于其{g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}最大生命值{/g}{uip|thp|3667d95821c34b03af8e92b93facf9fa}%的{g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}临时生命值{/g}。此效果最多叠加10次。
languages.original_text: Whenever a creature dies or falls unconscious, Trazyn gains {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} equal to {uip|thp|3667d95821c34b03af8e92b93facf9fa}% of his {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

traits.locale_text: 有生物死亡或昏迷时，特拉金获得等同于其{g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}最大生命值{/g}{uip|thp|3667d95821c34b03af8e92b93facf9fa}%的{g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}临时生命值{/g}。此效果最多叠加10次。

languages.text: Siempre que una criatura muere o cae inconsciente, Trazyn gana {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}heridas temporales{/g} igual al {uip|thp|3667d95821c34b03af8e92b93facf9fa} % de sus propias {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}heridas máximas{/g}. Este efecto se acumula hasta 10 veces.
languages.original_text: Whenever a creature dies or falls unconscious, Trazyn gains {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} equal to {uip|thp|3667d95821c34b03af8e92b93facf9fa}% of his {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

traits.locale_text: Siempre que una criatura muere o cae inconsciente, Trazyn gana {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}heridas temporales{/g} igual al {uip|thp|3667d95821c34b03af8e92b93facf9fa} % de sus propias {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}heridas máximas{/g}. Este efecto se acumula hasta 10 veces.

languages.text: Wenn eine Kreatur stirbt oder bewusstlos wird, erhält Trazyn {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporäre Wunden{/g} in Höhe von {uip|thp|3667d95821c34b03af8e92b93facf9fa} % seiner {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximalen Wunden{/g}. Dieser Effekt ist bis zu 10-mal stapelbar.
languages.original_text: Whenever a creature dies or falls unconscious, Trazyn gains {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} equal to {uip|thp|3667d95821c34b03af8e92b93facf9fa}% of his {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

traits.locale_text: Wenn eine Kreatur stirbt oder bewusstlos wird, erhält Trazyn {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporäre Wunden{/g} in Höhe von {uip|thp|3667d95821c34b03af8e92b93facf9fa} % seiner {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximalen Wunden{/g}. Dieser Effekt ist bis zu 10-mal stapelbar.

languages.text: 生き物が死んだり気絶したりすると、トラズンは{g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}最大傷{/g}の{uip|thp|3667d95821c34b03af8e92b93facf9fa}%の{g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}一時傷{/g}を負う。この効果は最大10回まで重ねられる。

traits.locale_text: 生き物が死んだり気絶したりすると、トラズンは{g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}最大傷{/g}の{uip|thp|3667d95821c34b03af8e92b93facf9fa}%の{g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}一時傷{/g}を負う。この効果は最大10回まで重ねられる。
